activity.message: style(ui): improve view profile button prominence and contribution calendar visibility
fix(ci): remove gists query as it is restricted for default GITHUB_TOKEN
feat(ui): add pinned repos, expanded insights, and analysis bar charts

fix: remove layout typo and legacy organization dates

- Removed rogue 'l>' typo from the closing </html> tag in Layout.astro that was visible at the bottom of all pages.
- Replaced hardcoded 'Established 2018' badges in the About pages with a generic 'Open Source' tag.
